ogTitle: Upper Turon vs Upper Wilsons Creek: Climate Safety

heading: Upper Turon vs Upper Wilsons Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Turon, New South Wales and Upper Wilsons Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Wilsons Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Upper Turon (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Turon or Upper Wilsons Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Turon has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Upper Wilsons Creek scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Turon scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Wilsons Creek scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Turon or Upper Wilsons Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Wilsons Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
